texto: To express oneself fluently involves more than simply speaking the language properly. It includes inflection, voice, posture, gestures, and clothing. All of these elements add up to an individual’s personal expression. They are the elements of style.
explicacao: Citação de Kate Betts sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “To express oneself fluently involves more than simply speaking the language properly. It includes…” articula autoestima, fashion, paris em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como paris e style.
